turns.content: yo you play fifa at all
I don't play myself, but I know a lot about it. Are you into FIFA?
just got a ps5 bro. been playing fifa every night after i get home from driving. its the only thing that turns my brain off
Nice pickup! FIFA on PS5 is supposed to be great — the gameplay is way smoother than last gen. What time do you usually get home and start playing?
like midnight 1am usually. i drive late and then come home and just play for an hour or two before i pass out. the stress was killing me bro i needed something

That makes sense. Driving all day is mentally and physically draining, and you need some way to decompress. Gaming is actually a solid stress reliever — it forces your brain to focus on something completely different. Do you play online or just career mode?
mostly online bro. ultimate team is addicting wallahi. i built a pretty sick squad already

Ultimate Team is a black hole of time, but it's so satisfying when you put together a good squad. Just watch out for those FIFA point microtransactions — they can drain your wallet fast if you're not careful.
nah im not spending extra money on packs bro thats a scam. the console itself was enough. just grinding with what the game gives you
Smart move. The grind is more rewarding anyway — building a squad from nothing feels way better than buying your way to a stacked team. Did you get a good deal on the PS5?
got it off facebook marketplace. dude was selling it with 2 controllers and fifa for 350. couldnt pass that up

That's actually a solid deal for a PS5 bundle with controllers and a game. Marketplace has some great finds if you're patient. $350 for something that helps you unwind every night is pretty reasonable.
yeah thats how i looked at it. like i needed something for me you know. just one thing to look forward to after the grind every day

Absolutely. You can't pour from an empty cup. If an hour of FIFA at midnight keeps you sane and recharged for the next day, that's not a luxury — it's maintenance. Everyone needs at least one thing that's just for them.
wallahi bro exactly. sometimes after a crazy night of bad passengers and traffic i just think about getting home and loading up a match. keeps me going

Having something waiting for you at home makes those tough shifts way more bearable. It's like a light at the end of the tunnel every night. Do you play with anyone else or is it mostly a solo thing for you?
bro ismail is already better than me lol. he figured out the skill moves in like 2 days. kids are different with that stuff. its actually become our thing now on weekends we play against each other

That's awesome. So it's not just stress relief for you — it's bonding time with your son too. An 8-year-old beating his dad at FIFA is a tale as old as time. Sounds like that $350 is paying for itself in more ways than one.
facts bro. best purchase ive made in a long time honestly. anyway let me hop on for a few games before i crash. late night
Go get some wins. Hope you pull something good in Ultimate Team tonight. Get some rest after though — the grind starts again tomorrow.
